title: Classic Tan Leather Recliner Armchair with Nailhead Trim
description:
Tan leather recliner armchair in a classic style with nailhead trim. Very comfortable and works perfectly.

Condition: used. There are some scratches, a stain on the leather, and one nailhead (stud) is missing, as shown in the photos. These are cosmetic only and do not affect function.

Great solid chair with lots of life left. Perfect for a living room, reading corner, or office.
